description: Workspace admins need to manage membership without editing the database directly.

userStories.title: Add audit log schema
userStories.description: As a system, I want to store audit logs for membership changes.
acceptanceCriteria: Add audit log table to schema

userStories.title: Add invite member feature
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to invite members by email.
acceptanceCriteria: UI form to input email and send invite
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add member role change feature
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to change a member role between viewer, editor, and admin.
acceptanceCriteria: UI dropdown in member list to select role
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add revoke access feature
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to revoke workspace access.
acceptanceCriteria: UI button in member list to remove user
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add audit log review view
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to review recent membership changes in the workspace settings page.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend endpoint to fetch audit logs
UI view in settings page to display recent logs
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
